data.content:
This is an MSTest project using VSTest. To run only the `Integration` category tests:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This will match the two tests decorated with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`: `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase` and `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`.
